metadata.description: Grounded semantic SEO, GEO & off-page skills for Claude Code — with a fabrication guard.

plugins.name: semantic-seo-suite
plugins.description: 10 skills: entity-based topical maps, content briefs, fabrication-guarded AI drafts, schema/JSON-LD, site audits, GSC tracking, GEO (get cited by ChatGPT), backlinks, and distribution. Every number tagged measured/derived/asserted.
